protein_name: As a member of the subcortical maternal complex (SCMC), plays an essential role for zygotes to progress beyond the first embryonic cell divisions. Belongs to the WD repeat Groucho/TLE family. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cell cortex; cytoplasm; cytoplasmic lattice; cytosol; nucleus; protein-containing complex; sperm midpiece; subcortical maternal complex; transcription regulator complex
raw_fields.Molecular Function: protein binding; structural constituent of cytoplasmic lattice; transcription corepressor activity
raw_fields.Biological Process: actin filament organization; developmental process; embryonic process involved in female pregnancy; endoplasmic reticulum localization; epigenetic programming in the zygotic pronuclei; establishment of spindle localization; flagellated sperm motility; mitochondrion localization; negative regulation of canonical Wnt signaling pathway; negative regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II; positive regulation of embryonic development; protein storage; regulation of cell division; regulation of DNA-templated transcription; spermatogenesis
